response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio is conversational and matches the provided context. 2. JSON Usage: No lyrics provided or needed; manual transcription performed. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps follow vocal bursts and natural pauses. Grouped phrases for readability.

subtitles.original: 横に切るんだ
subtitles.english: I'll cut it horizontally.

subtitles.original: えっ、こうか？
subtitles.english: Wait, like this?

subtitles.original: 食べやすければなんだったって
subtitles.english: As long as it's easy to eat, it's fine.

subtitles.original: 確かにこっちかも。こうね
subtitles.english: Yeah, maybe this way. Like this.

subtitles.original: じゃあ、横のと縦のがありますので、縦が当たりということでね
subtitles.english: Well, since there are both horizontal and vertical ones, let's say vertical is the winner.

subtitles.original: ひと皿の中に縦のパプリカと横のパプリカ、どっちが多かったかで明日の運勢を占ってください
subtitles.english: Depending on which has more vertical or horizontal paprika in one dish, please tell your fortune for tomorrow.

subtitles.original: さあ、えー、では、これで野菜は切り終わって
subtitles.english: Now then, that's all for cutting the vegetables.

subtitles.original: 鶏肉はね、いつものごとく切られてるやつを買ってきたんで、切るもの終わり！
subtitles.english: As for the chicken, I bought pre-cut ones as usual, so no more cutting!

subtitles.original: じゃじゃーん！
subtitles.english: Ta-da!

subtitles.original: 焼いていくよー
subtitles.english: Time to fry them!

subtitles.original: フライパンにサラダ油を入れる
subtitles.english: Put some vegetable oil in the pan.

subtitles.original: ここはいつものこよちゃんは健康志向なので、オリーブオイルですね
subtitles.english: But since Koyo-chan is health-conscious, we'll use olive oil.

subtitles.original: ちょっとうるさくなります
subtitles.english: It's going to get a bit noisy.

subtitles.original: オリーブオイルを引いて
subtitles.english: Adding the olive oil.

subtitles.original: 焼き始めようとすると気になんねんなー
subtitles.english: I start worrying when it's time to start frying.

subtitles.original: 鶏肉に塩胡椒振るから
subtitles.english: I'll sprinkle salt and pepper on the chicken.

subtitles.original: 塩胡椒振るのは、ちょっとこっちでやってくるわ
subtitles.english: I'll go over here to add the salt and pepper.

subtitles.original: エクストラバージンオリーブオイルみたいなものです
subtitles.english: It's something like extra virgin olive oil.

subtitles.original: 分からん、名前は
subtitles.english: I don't know the exact name.

subtitles.original: 鮮度が保たれるってボトルのやつ使っとるよ
subtitles.english: I'm using the one in the bottle that says it stays fresh.
Salt, salt...

subtitles.original: 塩振って
subtitles.english: Sprinkling salt.

subtitles.original: あ、待って、すげー熱っ！
subtitles.english: Oh, wait, it's really hot!

subtitles.original: すごい熱してた
subtitles.english: It was heating up a lot.

subtitles.original: めっちゃオリーブオイルのいい香りすると思ったら
subtitles.english: I wondered why it smelled so much of olive oil.

subtitles.original: 胡椒はね、高級志向で、挽く胡椒
subtitles.english: For pepper, I'm going high-end with ground pepper.

subtitles.original: ミルで挽いてかけまして
subtitles.english: Grind it with the mill and sprinkle it.

subtitles.original: いい香りいい香り. これ何の香りだ？
subtitles.english: Smells good, smells good. What's this scent?

subtitles.original: オリーブオイルかな？
subtitles.english: Is it the olive oil?

subtitles.original: 鶏肉に胡椒かけただけでいい匂いしないもんね
subtitles.english: Chicken doesn't smell this good just with pepper.

subtitles.original: で、菜箸を探すところから...あったあった
subtitles.english: Now, starting with finding chopsticks... found them.

subtitles.original: じゃあ、これね、ちょっとかけたやつを、焼きます！
subtitles.english: Now, I'll fry these pieces I seasoned!

subtitles.original: いい音ー
subtitles.english: Nice sound.

subtitles.original: これ入れてから塩振っても良かったな
subtitles.english: I could have added salt after putting them in.

subtitles.original: もうちょっと塩振ろうかな
subtitles.english: Maybe I'll add a bit more salt.

subtitles.original: 振りすぎたかな？
subtitles.english: Did I add too much?
